title: Women Are Trouble
writer: Michael Fessier, George Harmon Coxe, Richard Blake
actors: Stuart Erwin, Paul Kelly, Florence Rice
plot: When Prohibition ends, the mobsters move into the "protection" racket; those who do not pay are knocked off. Small-town reporter Ruth wants a job at the big-city paper, but the editor will not hire her, so she looks for a story an...
